Default Prove-Up In Scd.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc. dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and reviewing the declaration of Ross Hawkins in support of Default Judgment, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: SF Buddy Company, LLC, a California limited liability company as follows:
Damages $36,474.38
Prejudgment Interest $8,400.00
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $393.50, for a total of $47,767.88
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
